validation.categoryMin_other: At least {count} selections required for "{categoryName}" in {forceName} (currently: {current}).
validation.categoryMax_one: At most {count} selection allowed for "{categoryName}" in {forceName} (currently: {current}).
validation.categoryMax_other: At most {count} selections allowed for "{categoryName}" in {forceName} (currently: {current}).

validation.entryPercentMax: Option "{selectionName}" may make up at most {percent}% of the {unit} ({threshold}), but is {actual}.
validation.groupCountMax_one: Category "{groupName}" allows at most {count} selection (currently: {current} for {selectionName}).
validation.groupCountMax_other: Category "{groupName}" allows at most {count} selections (currently: {current} for {selectionName}).
validation.groupCountMin_one: Category "{groupName}" requires at least {count} selection (currently: {current} for {selectionName}).

importer.error.systemListUnavailable: The imported game systems could not be loaded from the database.
importer.error.indexUnreachable: The catalogue index is currently unreachable. Please try again later.
importer.error.noDataAvailable: No game data available for import. The catalogue index could not be loaded.
importer.error.systemLoadFailed: Failed to load the game system: {status}
importer.error.importFailed: Failed to import the game data: {message}
importer.error.noRawXml: This game system was imported before the update and has no original XML files in the database. Please re-import the game system (.zip) to be able to use the export.
importer.error.systemExportFailed: Failed to export the game system as ZIP: {message}
importer.error.systemDeleteFailed: Failed to delete the game system.
importer.success.systemExported: Game system "{name}" successfully exported as .zip (original format)!
importer.bundle.title: Import predefined game data
importer.bundle.description: Import a complete game system including selected factions directly from the bundled files.
importer.loading.title: Summoning game data...
importer.loading.subtitle: Processing XML files, please wait...
importer.empty.title: Welcome to Tome of Battle
importer.empty.text: Your tome of knowledge is still empty. To raise armies, you first need game data in the BattleScribe format.
importer.emptyListHint: No game systems present in the database.
importer.deleteSystem.title: Delete game system
importer.deleteSystem.confirmPrefix: Are you sure you want to delete the game system
importer.missingDeps.headline: Import aborted: a selected catalogue references a library catalogue that was not selected.
importer.missingDeps.instruction: Please also select the following catalogues to ensure a complete import:
importer.failedCatalogues.headline: The following catalogues could not be read and are missing from the imported system:
importer.failedCatalogues.consequence: Army lists of these factions can only be rebuilt after another complete import.
importer.importSuccess.complete: The system "{name}" with {count} catalogues was imported successfully!
importer.importSuccess.incomplete: The system "{name}" was imported incompletely: {importedCount} of {expectedCount} catalogues could be read.
serialization.missingSystem: The game system "{name}" (ID: {id}) is missing. Please import it first.
serialization.damagedArchive: The file is a damaged ZIP archive and could not be extracted.
serialization.missingRosterEntry: The ZIP archive contains no {extension} file.
serialization.invalidFormat: Invalid file format: the root element must be <roster>.
persistence.roster: The army list could not be saved. Your latest changes are not secured.
persistence.gameState: The game state could not be saved. Wounds, points and round are not secured.
rosterList.systemDeleted: The associated game system was deleted. Import it again.
rosterList.systemMissingExport: The associated game system is missing. The export cannot be performed.
rosterList.renameFailed: The roster could not be renamed.
rosterList.deleteFailed: The roster could not be deleted.
appData.loadFailed: The stored game systems and rosters could not be loaded.
appData.refreshFailed: Could not update the following systems; the previous data remains in use: {systems}
